hero.title: QJudge - The Most Secure and Stable Online Exam Platform
hero.subtitle: A high-quality testing environment built for academic settings. Integrating AI proctoring, paper-based questions, and real-time evaluation, ensuring every exam is fair, efficient, and in-depth.

seo.title: QJudge | Secure & Stable Online Exam Platform
seo.description: QJudge is an online exam and evaluation platform designed for education, supporting 20+ programming languages, diverse question types, and strict anti-cheating monitoring.

modes.title: Supports Multiple Contest and Learning Modes

lab.label: Lab Practice
lab.desc: Pure practice mode. Topic-based problem sets for students to improve at their own pace without pressure.

interactive.title: Deeply Rooted in Every Detail of the Teaching Process

editor.label: AI-Assisted Question Creation
editor.desc: Build and refine exam questions across subjects through AI conversations — from settings to test cases in one go.

grading.label: Grading & Analytics
grading.desc: Visual grade overview to instantly track each student's answers and grading progress per question.

proctor.label: Anti-Cheating Proctoring
proctor.desc: Real-time detection of tab switches, window exits and anomalies with automatic warnings and violation logs.

stats.label: Exam Interface
stats.desc: Clean question list and answer area that keeps students focused on the exam itself.

paper.title: More than just code, a complete online testing system
paper.description: Support for single choice, multiple choice, true/false, and short answer questions. Built-in Markdown and LaTeX editors accurately render complex mathematical formulas and technical documents, meeting diverse needs from general education to science and programming.

antiCheat.title: No Installation Needed, Industry-Leading Anti-Cheat Technology
antiCheat.description: Full-range browser-based detection allows examinees to enter a strict proctoring environment without any plugins or software. We defend every effort and ensure absolute fairness in every test.

teacher.title: Let teachers focus on teaching, leave the rest to QJudge
teacher.description: We have redefined the digital grading experience. An intuitive three-column grading panel, real-time proctoring dashboard, and automated results statistical analysis can save over 70% of management and grading time.

judge.title: Excellent Evaluation Experience
judge.description: Supports 20+ programming languages, returns execution time and memory info in seconds, and provides precise Diff comparison and error tracking.

paper.title: Paper Question Integration (Online Exam)
paper.description: More than just code. Integrates multiple-choice, true/false, and short answer questions, supports LaTeX formulas and Markdown, for one-stop diverse assessment.

antiCheat.title: Strict Anti-Cheat Monitoring
antiCheat.description: Full-screen lock, tab switch detection, video evidence, and AI violation analysis ensure absolute fairness in online exams.

teacher.title: Friendlier Teacher System
teacher.description: Intuitive grading panel, real-time proctoring dashboard, and detailed grade statistics allow teachers to focus on teaching rather than administration.

exam.title: Comprehensive Assessment Experience
exam.description: From programming to general theory, QJudge provides full support. Built-in LaTeX and Markdown editors make creating and answering questions equally smooth.

miniJudge.title: Try QJudge in one flow: Problem, Code, Submit, Results

problem.title: Nth Fibonacci Number
problem.description: Given an integer n, return the nth Fibonacci number where F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.

browse.title: Browse problems
browse.description: Filter by difficulty and tags; review statements and samples.

code.title: Write code
code.description: Use the built-in editor with syntax highlighting and autocomplete.

submit.title: Submit & test
submit.description: One-click submission with instant results and detailed report.

improve.title: Keep improving
improve.description: Discuss, compare solutions, and join contests or labs.

highlights.title: Designed for teaching and competition
highlights.item5: Modern UI built on IBM Carbon

testimonials.title: What students say
testimonials.quote1: Realtime feedback helps me spot issues faster than traditional assignments!
testimonials.quote2: The diff view makes debugging easier. The interface is intuitive.
testimonials.quote3: Lab mode aligns perfectly with our course flow and discussions.
